'''gasopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignorization|ignorization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignorization|ignorization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gasopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsepeth|gæsepeth]] || [[word:gæsepej|gæsepej]] || [[word:gæsepesh|gæsepesh]] || [[word:gæsepe|gæsepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasosopoth|gasosopoth]] || [[word:gasosopoj|gasosopoj]] || [[word:gasosoposh|gasosoposh]] || [[word:gasosopo|gasosopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasopoth|gasopoth]] || [[word:gasopoj|gasopoj]] || [[word:gasoposh|gasoposh]] || [[word:gasopo|gasopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasofpofth|gasofpofth]] || [[word:gasofpofj|gasofpofj]] || [[word:gasofpofsh|gasofpofsh]] || [[word:gasofpof|gasofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gasopotho|gasopotho]] || [[word:gasopojo|gasopojo]] || [[word:gasoposho|gasoposho]] || [[word:gasopoko|gasopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gasopoth|gasopoth]] || [[word:gasopoj|gasopoj]] || [[word:gasoposh|gasoposh]] || [[word:gasopo|gasopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gasopothol|gasopothol]] || [[word:gasopojol|gasopojol]] || [[word:gasoposhol|gasoposhol]] || [[word:gasopokol|gasopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gasopoothotho|gasopoothotho]] || [[word:gasopoojojo|gasopoojojo]] || [[word:gasopooshosho|gasopooshosho]] || [[word:gasopooko|gasopooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gasopothon|gasopothon]] || [[word:gasopojon|gasopojon]] || [[word:gasoposhon|gasoposhon]] || [[word:gasopokon|gasopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gasopothooro|gasopothooro]] || [[word:gasopojooro|gasopojooro]] || [[word:gasoposhooro|gasoposhooro]] || [[word:gasopokooro|gasopokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
